year_month: The year and month when the IT & Security team took actions. This should be in the format YYYY-MM.
action_details: A detailed description of the action taken by the IT & Security team to support secure vendor contact storage.
company_name: The name of the company where the action was taken. This is useful to differentiate when compiling data from multiple companies.
number_of_documents_audited: The number of documents audited for compliance by the IT & Security team during the action.
